periods.name: This Afternoon
periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2pm and 3pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 3pm and 4pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 4pm and 5pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy. High near 70, with temperatures falling to around 68 in the afternoon. South wind 21 to 24 mph, with gusts as high as 46 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

periods.name: Tonight
periods.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 11pm. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy. Low around 26, with temperatures rising to around 31 overnight. West wind around 23 mph, with gusts as high as 41 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%.

periods.name: Monday
periods.shortForecast: Slight Chance Snow Showers then Mostly Cloudy
periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of snow showers between 9am and noon. Mostly cloudy. High near 35, with temperatures falling to around 33 in the afternoon. West northwest wind 18 to 22 mph, with gusts as high as 37 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

periods.name: Monday Night
